chunks.title: Divisions of the Gatekeepers
chunks.reason: Covers the genealogies and assignment of duties for the gatekeepers from Korah and Merari.

chunks.title: Custodians of Treasures
chunks.reason: Details the Levites responsible for the treasures and holy gifts.

chunks.title: Administrative Duties of Levites
chunks.reason: Describes the roles of Izharites and Hebronites as officers, judges, and overseers.
